[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100100 3
1 1111111 a
2 0000000 a
3 0010101 3
4 0000010 1
5 1010011 4
6 0010011 3
7 0001110 3

56 65 1100000 2
67 76 1100100 3 match 0
